user.title: Selecionar país
user.description: The selected country is used to determine public holidays (calculated locally, no internet required)

subdivision.title: Select region
subdivision.description: Some countries have regional holidays. Select your state/region for the most accurate holiday calendar, or choose 'Entire country' to use only national holidays

frequency.title: Selecione a frequência de pagamento
frequency.description: Escolha com que frequência você recebe o pagamento

monthly_day.title: Selecione o dia do mês
monthly_day.description: Escolha em que dia do mês você recebe o pagamento

bank_offset.title: Dias antes do último dia bancário
bank_offset.description: Se você recebe o pagamento alguns dias antes do último dia bancário, escolha quantos dias antes

specific_day.title: Selecione o dia específico
specific_day.description: Selecione o dia exato em que você recebe o pagamento a cada mês

cycle_last_paydate.title: Selecione o último dia de pagamento
cycle_last_paydate.description: Selecione a última data em que você recebeu o pagamento. Ela será usada para calcular o próximo dia de pagamento

weekly.title: Selecione o dia de pagamento semanal
weekly.description: Escolha em que dia da semana você recebe o pagamento

error.invalid_country: The selected country is not supported by the holidays library

init.title: Adjust IsItPayday settings
init.description: Modify the settings for this payday tracker

subdivision.title: Select region
subdivision.description: Some countries have regional holidays. Select your state/region for the most accurate holiday calendar, or choose 'Entire country' to use only national holidays

frequency.title: Select payout frequency
frequency.description: Choose how often you get paid

monthly_day.title: Select day of month
monthly_day.description: Choose which day of the month you are paid

bank_offset.title: Days before the last banking day
bank_offset.description: If you are paid a few days before the last banking day, choose how many days before

specific_day.title: Select specific day
specific_day.description: Select the exact day you are paid each month

cycle_last_paydate.title: Select last payday
cycle_last_paydate.description: Select the last date you were paid. This will be used to calculate the next payday

weekly.title: Select weekly payday
weekly.description: Choose which weekday you are paid each week

unsupported_country.title: Country no longer supported
unsupported_country.description: The country "{country}" configured for IsItPayday is no longer supported by the holidays library. Please open the integration options and select a supported country.
